title: Kidplokio Blue Jumbo Shopping Cart Pretend Playset Play Food Kids Ages 3 and Up
description:
Clean up in aisle three! Kids and toddlers will love Kidplokio’s Adjustable Jumbo Shopping Cart Playset with lots of play food. The supermarket playset for kids comes with 27 pretend play food items like different vegetables and fruits, sweet treats, boxed food, juice, coffee, and more! With this jumbo grocery cart playset, little shoppers can mimic and recreates real-life grocery experiences they see while running errands with Mom or Dad! This shopping cart playset will help little ones develop their imagination, fine motor skills, and hand-eye coordination, and learn about different types of foods, counting, colors, shapes, and more! The durable plastic wheels make it easy for little shoppers to push on both carpet and hard floor surfaces

Kidplokio Blue Jumbo Shopping Cart Pretend Playset Play Food Kids Ages 3 and Up

Clean up in aisle three!

Kids and toddlers will love Kidplokio’s Adjustable Jumbo Shopping Cart Playset with lots of play food. The supermarket playset for kids comes with 27 pretend play food items like different vegetables and fruits, sweet treats, boxed food, juice, coffee, and more!

Key Features

  • KIDS SHOPPING CART: Playtime in Aisle Three! This jumbo shopping cart adjusts to three different positions to keep grocery shopping exciting, and to adapt to your little one as they grow; the shopping cart comes with lots of play food as well as fun lights and sounds to make playtime even more fun and realistic!
  • PRETEND PLAY: Kidplokio’s jumbo shopping cart comes with 27 play food accessories like different kinds of fruits and vegetables, juice, coffee, and sweet treats too! And, the durable plastic wheels make it easy for little shoppers to push on both carpet and hard floor surfaces as they play
  • FUN LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: On top of fun pretend play grocery shopping and check-out games, the shopping cart for kids comes with lights and sounds on the handle to make playtime even more fun and realistic!
  • FINE MOTOR TOYS: With this jumbo grocery cart playset, little shoppers can mimic and recreate real-life grocery experiences they see while running errands with Mom or Dad! This shopping cart playset will help little ones develop their imagination, fine motor skills, and hand-eye coordination, and learn about different types of foods, counting, colors, shapes, and more!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 19 x 16 x 13 inches; Batteries: x2 AAA (not included); Colors: Pink or Blue; Weight: 2.60lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LSTKPLSCPB
  • UPC: 810058485212
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 19 in x 16 in x 13 in

With this jumbo grocery cart playset, little shoppers can mimic and recreates real-life grocery experiences they see while running errands with Mom or Dad! This shopping cart playset will help little ones develop their imagination, fine motor skills, and hand-eye coordination, and learn about different types of foods, counting, colors, shapes, and more! The durable plastic wheels make it easy for little shoppers to push on both carpet and hard floor surfaces. And, this adjustable shopping cart and supermarket playset will be a long-lasting toy in any playroom, with three different positions that accommodate little ones as they grow!

And, what’s more, this super fun jumbo adjustable shopping cart for kids has lights and sounds too! (Batteries not included). Along the handlebar, lights and sound buttons are easy for kids to see and access, and will make playtime even more fun and realistic!

Feed your child’s creative side and have them run down the aisles of their imagination with this Jumbo Shopping Cart Supermarket Playset from Kidplokio! A perfect item for busy and active toddlers and kids that will surely provide hours of pretend play and learning opportunities too!
